scripts.dev: concurrently -n user,health,notification,ai,frontend -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix user-service run dev" "npm --prefix health-data-service run dev" "npm --prefix notification-service run dev" "ai-risk-service\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 --app-dir ai-risk-service" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1"
